demographics.living_situation: lives at home; daughter helps with domestic tasks and is present for the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My breathing's been getting worse and worse, my belly feels tight and bloated, and my legs have blown up like balloons. I've had bad lungs for years but this feels different.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The swelling and the breathlessness have got a lot worse over the last few weeks and my daughter said I should get it looked at today rather than wait.

symptom_narrative.onset: the breathlessness has crept up over about three weeks; the leg swelling and bloated belly are newer
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly three weeks and steadily worsening
symptom_narrative.character: gets puffed just moving around the house; legs are heavy and swollen, belly feels tight and full
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: worse than my usual bad breathing days — I run out of puff doing almost nothing now
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: legs, belly, and my breathing; also a dull ache under my ribs on the right side
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there all the time now and slowly getting worse
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: resting helps the breathlessness a little; nothing helps the swelling
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a dull ache in the right upper part of my tummy; legs feel heavy
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get chest infections and flare-ups of my lungs, but I've never swelled up like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can barely get around the house now and rely on my daughter for most things

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: bad lungs / emphysema-type lung disease for about 10 years
past_medical_history.how_managed: puffers/inhalers and a home oxygen machine

social_history_volunteered.smoking_status: long-standing smoking history behind my lung disease
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: mobility is now largely limited to the home; daughter helps with domestic tasks and is present for the call

objective_data_offered.value: 89% on room air on a home fingertip oximeter
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: consumer fingertip oximeter, not clinically validated; a chronic-lung-disease baseline may already run low, so a single reading cannot be taken at face value

objective_data_offered.value: breathing fast and using neck and shoulder muscles to breathe; barrel-shaped chest; a bluish tinge to the lips and fingertips
daughter reports both legs are swollen right up to the thighs and his tummy looks bloated and distended; he gets breathless just moving around the house
dull ache under the ribs on the right side; body weight around 78 kg
a home oxygen concentrator is in the room but he admits he has not been using it much lately
